arts.ttl: VIDEO: Why Have Real Madrid Had So Many Injuries?
arts.sum: In a recently released exclusive Members-only podcast on Patreon, Managing Madrid’s Kiyan Sobhani and Vik Sobti (a leading radiologist in the United States) discussed scientific explanations behind Real Madrid’s injury crisis from the past couple years. Listeners and watchers are encouraged to sign up as a Member on Patreon to ensure they don’t miss out on the bonus content that Managing Madrid posts multiple times per week.
